recipe.title: Homemade salt beef
recipe.description: Succulent and full of flavour, Jamie's homemade salt beef recipe is delicious with bagels, mustard and pickles.

ingredients.name: your favourite bagels
ingredients.note: or make your own, to serve

steps.descr: At least 2 days – but ideally up to a week – before you...
steps.instructions: At least 2 days – but ideally up to a week – before you would like to serve the salt beef, make a start on the brine. Place all the brine ingredients in a large pan on a medium heat. Pour in 2 litres of cold water and bring to boil, then reduce to a simmer for 5 minutes until the salt has dissolved. Set aside and allow to cool completely.

on_enter.say: At least 2 days – but ideally up to a week – before you would like to serve the salt beef, make a start on the brine. Place all the brine ingredients in a large pan on a medium heat. Pour in 2 litres of cold water and bring to boil, then reduce to a simmer for 5 minutes until the salt has dissolved. Set aside and allow to cool completely.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, remove the sinew and thick layer of fat from...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, remove the sinew and thick layer of fat from the meat, leaving a little behind for bonus flavour. Pierce the meat with a small sharp knife or skewer all over on both sides and place in a non-metallic sealable container. Pour the cooled brine over the brisket, then seal and store in the fridge for 5 to 7 days, turning the brisket over each day.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, remove the sinew and thick layer of fat from the meat, leaving a little behind for bonus flavour. Pierce the meat with a small sharp knife or skewer all over on both sides and place in a non-metallic sealable container. Pour the cooled brine over the brisket, then seal and store in the fridge for 5 to 7 days, turning the brisket over each day.

steps.descr: When the brining time is up, remove the brisket from the...
steps.instructions: When the brining time is up, remove the brisket from the container and soak in cold water for 10 minutes.

on_enter.say: When the brining time is up, remove the brisket from the container and soak in cold water for 10 minutes.

steps.descr: Rinse the brisket well, then place in a large saucepan...
steps.instructions: Rinse the brisket well, then place in a large saucepan and cover with fresh cold water, until the beef is submerged.

on_enter.say: Rinse the brisket well, then place in a large saucepan and cover with fresh cold water, until the beef is submerged.

steps.descr: Peel and quarter the onions, then add to the pan with...
steps.instructions: Peel and quarter the onions, then add to the pan with the bay and peppercorns.

on_enter.say: Peel and quarter the onions, then add to the pan with the bay and peppercorns.

steps.descr: Bring to the boil, then reduce to a low heat and simmer...
steps.instructions: Bring to the boil, then reduce to a low heat and simmer for 2½ hours to 3 hours, or until the brisket is tender.

on_enter.say: Bring to the boil, then reduce to a low heat and simmer for 2½ hours to 3 hours, or until the brisket is tender.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, mix all the mustard ingredients together in a...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, mix all the mustard ingredients together in a small bowl and season with a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Loosen with a drop more vinegar, if it looks a little thick.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, mix all the mustard ingredients together in a small bowl and season with a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Loosen with a drop more vinegar, if it looks a little thick.

steps.descr: Slice up the gherkins and place them in a small bowl
steps.instructions: Slice up the gherkins and place them in a small bowl. Dress them with a couple of tablespoons of their pickling liquor and pick over the dill fronds. Finely slice the chillies – deseed if you prefer – then add to the bowl and mix together.

on_enter.say: Slice up the gherkins and place them in a small bowl. Dress them with a couple of tablespoons of their pickling liquor and pick over the dill fronds. Finely slice the chillies – deseed if you prefer – then add to the bowl and mix together.

steps.descr: Carefully remove the brisket to a board and thinly slice...
steps.instructions: Carefully remove the brisket to a board and thinly slice off what you need. (You can keep the rest of the meat in the liquor to stop it drying out.)

on_enter.say: Carefully remove the brisket to a board and thinly slice off what you need. (You can keep the rest of the meat in the liquor to stop it drying out.)

steps.descr: To serve, split your bagels and spread a dollop of...
steps.instructions: To serve, split your bagels and spread a dollop of mustard on the base. Load up the pickles and pile on slices of the tender salt beef. Top with the bagel lid and tuck in!

on_enter.say: To serve, split your bagels and spread a dollop of mustard on the base. Load up the pickles and pile on slices of the tender salt beef. Top with the bagel lid and tuck in!
